prestazioni: RB26DETT engine: HKS GT-SS turbo kit (GT2835 ball-bearing turbo, 1.05 A/R turbine housing, 0.82 A/R compressor housing) with HKS 264°/264° camshafts, Tomei 272° adjustable cam gears, and Tomei M82 Type-II head gasket for 1.3mm overbore (87.5mm pistons, 10.5:1 CR) supporting 650hp on E85 fuel with HKS F-CON V Pro standalone ECU

N1-spec transmission with OS Giken 1.5-way LSD, PPG straight-cut 1st/2nd gears (2.785/1.925 ratios), and Nismo 3.21 final drive for optimized acceleration; reinforced with Cusco Type-RS 8-point roll cage and Nismo 240mm twin-plate clutch

Öhlins Road & Track DFV coilovers (24-way adjustable damping, 30mm front/28mm rear spring rates) with Nismo R33-specific pillowball upper mounts, Cusco front strut tower bar, and Whiteline adjustable rear sway bar (24mm) for RWD-biased torque vectoring
estetica: Veilside Fortune 99 widebody kit (R33-specific, 50mm front/70mm rear fender flares) with custom carbon fiber overfenders, molded to fit Nismo LM-GT2 18x11.5 +15/+30 wheels (275/35R18 front, 335/30R18 rear) and AP Racing 6-pot front/4-pot rear calipers
Tommy Kaira M20 aero package (R33-exclusive, 3-piece carbon front splitter, GT-wing with 1,200mm span and 300mm chord, and rear diffuser with integrated Nismo GT-R R33 V-Spec badging in gold leaf)

Recaro SRD-R full carbon bucket seats (R33-specific shell, FIA 8862-2009 certified) with Sabelt 6-point harnesses, custom rear seat delete panel (carbon fiber, with integrated fire suppression system), and Nismo R33 V-Spec titanium shift knob (limited to 500 units)
